basic_details.short_information: Panjab University has released a recruitment notification for 1 Field Investigator post for candidates with Post Graduation and a minimum of 55% marks, and candidates can apply offline up to 08-06-2026 through the official website of Panjab University.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Panjab University Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
